allowed_pages: exact-number example pages only when GSC/search demand exists
calculator support pages only when they strengthen money pages
decision pages only when they answer a real finance question
scenario pages only when unique and linked to a money page
blocked_pages: pages targeting head terms before authority exists
daily_process: identify query patterns with low competition
if existing page can satisfy intent: UPDATE existing page
create new page only if no existing page can satisfy intent
every new page MUST link to a money page
every new page MUST have unique explanation, example, and decision value
